```{r, fig.width=19,fig.height=25}
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

# Theme אחיד למקרא ולתיוג הפאנלים
legend_theme <- theme(
  legend.position   = "bottom",
  legend.box        = "horizontal",
  legend.text       = element_text(size = 12, face = "italic"),
  legend.title      = element_text(size = 13),
  legend.key.size   = unit(0.1, "cm"),
  legend.spacing.x  = unit(0.1, "cm"),
  legend.spacing.y  = unit(0.1, "cm"),
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
  plot.tag          = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")
)

# מוסיפים את אותו theme לכל גרף
# שימי לב: לא מסתירים מקרא, כדי ש-patchwork יוכל לאסוף אותו
pA <- OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot + legend_theme
pB <- PR_vs_SumOSA_plot       + legend_theme
pC <- PR_vs_Volume_plot       + legend_theme
pD <- PRV_vs_Volume_plot      + legend_theme

# בניית הפאנל 2x2 עם מקרא אחד משותף למטה
panel_with_legend_bottom <-
  ((pA | pB) /
   (pC | pD)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect")

# תצוגה
panel_with_legend_bottom

# שמירה
ggsave(
  filename = "panel_2x2_with_legend_bottom.png",
  plot     = panel_with_legend_bottom,
  width    = 14,
  height   = 14,
  dpi      = 300,
  bg       = "white"
)
```



# Panel- כללי לכל הבין מיני
```{r, fig.width=19,fig.height=25}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

# 1) פונקציה שמכווצת כל גרף לפאנל
compactify_plot <- function(p, drop_text_ann = TRUE) {
  if (drop_text_ann) {
    # מסיר שכבות טקסט (לרוב משוואות / annotate)
    p$layers <- p$layers[
      !vapply(
        p$layers,
        function(ly) inherits(ly$geom, "GeomText"),
        logical(1)
      )
    ]
  }

  p +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text  = element_text(size = 8),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      plot.margin = margin(4, 4, 4, 4)
    )
}

# 2) שמות הגרפים
plot_names <- c(
  "DeltaO2_vs_OsculumArea_plot", "OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot", "Rosc_vs_OsculumArea_plot",
  "DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_plot", "PR_vs_SumOSA_plot", "Rind_vs_SumOSA_plot",
  "PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_plot", "RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_plot",
  "DeltaO2_vs_Volume_plot", "PR_vs_Volume_plot", "Rind_vs_Volume_plot",
  "PRV_vs_Volume_plot", "RV_vs_Volume_plot"
)

# 3) לוקחים רק מה שקיים ובאמת ggplot
is_plot_object <- function(x) inherits(x, c("gg", "ggplot"))

available_names <- plot_names[
  sapply(plot_names, function(nm) {
    exists(nm, inherits = TRUE) && is_plot_object(get(nm, inherits = TRUE))
  })
]

plots_list <- lapply(available_names, function(nm) get(nm, inherits = TRUE))

if (length(plots_list) == 0) {
  stop("לא נמצאו אובייקטים של גרפים מהשמות שסופקו.")
}

# 4) מקטינים, סוגרים מקרא ומסירים שכבות טקסט
plots_list_small <- lapply(plots_list, compactify_plot)

# 5) בונים את הפאנל
panel <- wrap_plots(
  plots_list_small,
  ncol = 3,
  guides = "collect",
  byrow = TRUE
) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

# 6) תצוגה
panel

# 7) שמירה
rows <- ceiling(length(plots_list_small) / 3)

ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/big_3col_panel_final.png",
  plot     = panel,
  width    = 16,
  height   = max(9, rows * 5),
  dpi      = 300,
  bg       = "white"
)

```

```{r, fig.width=19,fig.height=25}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# השמות שנרצה בפאנל
needed <- c(
  "PR_vs_Volume_plot", "PRV_vs_Volume_plot",
  "OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot", "PR_vs_SumOSA_plot"
)

# פונקציה שמחזירה את האיור אם קיים, מסירה מקרא;
# ואם לא קיים – מחזירה spacer
safe_plot <- function(name) {
  if (exists(name, inherits = TRUE)) {
    p <- get(name, inherits = TRUE)
    if (inherits(p, c("gg", "ggplot"))) {
      return(
        p + theme(legend.position = "none")
      )
    }
  }
  patchwork::plot_spacer()
}

# בונים את 4 האיורים (ללא מקרא)
pA <- safe_plot("PR_vs_Volume_plot")
pB <- safe_plot("PRV_vs_Volume_plot")
pC <- safe_plot("OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot")
pD <- safe_plot("PR_vs_SumOSA_plot")

# פאנל 2x2, בלי מקרא בכלל
final_panel_nolegend <-
  ((pA | pB) /
   (pC | pD)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

# הצגה
final_panel_nolegend

# שמירה
ggsave(
  filename = "panel_PR_PRV_OFR_PRsumOSA_nolegend.png",
  plot     = final_panel_nolegend,
  width    = 14,
  height   = 10,
  dpi      = 300,
  bg       = "white"
)

```

# plot- osculum_Aoroides_df 
```{r, fig.width=8,fig.height=7}

NW_Ind_summary <- as.data.frame(all_sponge_data$NW_Mediterranean$NW_Ind_summary) 

# סינון נתונים ל-A.oroides בלבד
Aoroides_df <- NW_Ind_summary %>%
  filter(Species == "A.oroides")

my_plot_theme <- theme(
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
  axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 12)
)

# 1. Delta O2 ~ sum(Osculum area)
DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot <- ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(x = osculum_area_sum, y = Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
    y = expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")")
  ) + my_plot_theme

# 2. PR_L_hr ~ sum(Osculum area)
PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot <- ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(x = osculum_area_sum, y = PR_L_hr)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
    y = expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")")
  ) + my_plot_theme

# 3. Rind ~ sum(Osculum area)
Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot <- ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(x = osculum_area_sum, y = Rind_umol_hr)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
    y = expression("R"["ind"]~ "("*mu*"mol hr"^{-1}*")")
  ) + my_plot_theme

# 4. Rind / sum(Osculum area) ~ sum(Osculum area)
RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot <- ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(x = osculum_area_sum, y = Rind_umol_hr / osculum_area_sum)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
    y = expression(R[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2}*")")
  ) + my_plot_theme

# 5. PR_L_hr/ sum(Osculum area) ~ sum(Osculum area)
PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot <- ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(x = osculum_area_sum, y = PR_L_hr / osculum_area_sum)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
    y = expression(PR[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * "L hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2} * ")")
  ) + my_plot_theme

# 6.Volume_ml ~ sum(Osculum area)
Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot <- ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(x = Volume_ml , y = osculum_area_sum)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression("Volume (mL)"),
    y = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ) + my_plot_theme


# שמירת איורים (לשנות path אם צריך)
ggsave("DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png", plot = DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png", plot = PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png", plot = Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png", plot = RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png", plot = PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png", plot = Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
# צפייה ישירה ב-RStudio
DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot
PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot
Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot
RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot
PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot
Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot


```

# Panel- osculum_Aoroides_df 
```{r, fig.width=22,fig.height=15}

# --- פונקציה לציור איור log-log עם קו מגמה (למין אחד, צורה קבועה וצבע קבוע) ---
plot_powerlaw_single <- function(df, xvar, yvar, xlab, ylab, color="#FF7F00", shape=17, fname=NULL) {
  data_valid <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[xvar]]), !is.na(.data[[yvar]]), .data[[xvar]] > 0, .data[[yvar]] > 0)
  formula_str <- paste0("log(", yvar, ") ~ log(", xvar, ")")
  model <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = data_valid)
  sm <- summary(model)
  a <- exp(coef(model)[1])
  b <- coef(model)[2]
  r2 <- sm$r.squared
  pval <- sm$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
  trend_line <- NULL
  eq_text <- NULL
  if (!is.na(pval) && pval < 0.05) {
    x_vals <- seq(min(data_valid[[xvar]]), max(data_valid[[xvar]]), length.out = 100)
    y_vals <- a * x_vals^b
    trend_line <- data.frame(x = x_vals, y = y_vals)
    eq_text <- paste0(
      "italic(y) == ", signif(a, 3), " * x^", signif(b, 3),
      "*','~~italic(R)^2 == ", signif(r2, 3)
    )
  }
  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = xvar, y = yvar)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = color, shape = shape) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    my_plot_theme
  if (!is.null(trend_line)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_line(data = trend_line, aes(x = x, y = y),
                inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
      annotate("text",
               x = min(data_valid[[xvar]]) * 1.5,
               y = max(data_valid[[yvar]]) * 0.75,
               label = eq_text, parse = TRUE,
               hjust = 0, vjust = -0.7, size = 5)
  }
  if(!is.null(fname)){
    ggsave(fname, plot = p, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  }
  return(p)
}

# 1. הוספת עמודות מחושבות
Aoroides_df <- Aoroides_df %>%
  mutate(
    RsumOSA = Rind_umol_hr / osculum_area_sum,
    PRsumOSA = PR_L_hr / osculum_area_sum
  )

# 2. ציור איורים עם שמות ייחודיים
DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png"
)
PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "PR_L_hr",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png"
)
Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "Rind_umol_hr",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression("R"["ind"]~ "("*mu*"mol hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png"
)
RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "RsumOSA",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression(R[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2}*")"),
  fname = "RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png"
)
PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "PRsumOSA",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression(PR[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * "L hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2} * ")"),
  fname = "PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

# --- איור נוסף (לא בפאנל) ---
Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot <- ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(x = Volume_ml, y = osculum_area_sum)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17) +
  scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression("Volume (mL)"),
    y = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")")
  ) + my_plot_theme

ggsave("Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png", plot = Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

# להצגה ב־RStudio:
DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel
PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel
Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel
RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel
PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel
Volume_ml_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot

# יצירת גרסאות ללא legend
DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg   <- DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel   + theme(legend.position = "none")
PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg        <- PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel        + theme(legend.position = "none")
Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg      <- Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel      + theme(legend.position = "none")
RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg   <- RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel   + theme(legend.position = "none")
PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg  <- PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel  + theme(legend.position = "none")

# שורה תחתונה – רק שני איורים ועמודה שלישית ריקה
bottom_row <- RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg + 
              PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg + 
              plot_spacer()
bottom_row <- bottom_row + patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 1))

# שורה עליונה – שלושה איורים
top_row <- DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg +
           PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg +
           Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg
top_row <- top_row + patchwork::plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 1))

# פאנל סופי
multi_panel_Aoroides_plot <- 
  top_row /
  bottom_row +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1))

multi_panel_Aoroides_plot

# שמירה
ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/Aoroides_5panel.png",
  plot = multi_panel_Aoroides_plot,
  width = 22, height = 15, dpi = 300
)

```

# plot- Volume_Aoroides_df 
```{r echo=FALSE, fig.height=7, fig.width=10}

# יצירת עמודות מחושבות
NW_Ind_summary <- NW_Ind_summary %>%
  mutate(
    RV_umol_hr_ml = Rind_umol_hr / Volume_ml,
    PRV_L_hr_ml = PR_L_hr / Volume_ml
  )
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# עמודות מחושבות
NW_Ind_summary <- NW_Ind_summary %>%
  mutate(
    RV_umol_hr_ml = Rind_umol_hr / Volume_ml,
    PRV_L_hr_ml   = PR_L_hr / Volume_ml
  )

# Theme אחיד
my_plot_theme <- theme(
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
  axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 12)
)

# פונקציה ליצירת גרף log-log עם קו מגמה מובהק בלבד
plot_power_law_simple <- function(df, xvar, yvar, xlab, ylab, point_color="#FF7F00") {
  data_valid <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[xvar]]), !is.na(.data[[yvar]]), 
           .data[[xvar]] > 0, .data[[yvar]] > 0)
  
  # מודל רגרסיה log-log
  formula_str <- paste0("log(", yvar, ") ~ log(", xvar, ")")
  model <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = data_valid)
  sm <- summary(model)
  
  a <- exp(coef(model)[1])
  b <- coef(model)[2]
  r2 <- sm$r.squared
  pval <- sm$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

  p <- ggplot(data_valid, aes_string(x = xvar, y = yvar)) +
    geom_point(size = 5, color = point_color, shape = 17) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    my_plot_theme
  
  if (pval < 0.05) {
    # קו מגמה
    x_vals <- seq(min(data_valid[[xvar]]), max(data_valid[[xvar]]), length.out = 100)
    y_vals <- a * x_vals^b
    trend_line <- data.frame(x = x_vals, y = y_vals)
    eq_text <- paste0(
      "italic(y) == ", signif(a, 3), " * x^", signif(b, 3),
      "*','~~italic(R)^2 == ", signif(r2, 3)
    )
    p <- p +
      geom_line(data = trend_line, aes(x = x, y = y), inherit.aes = FALSE,
                color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
      annotate("text",
               x = min(data_valid[[xvar]]) * 1.4,
               y = max(data_valid[[yvar]]) * 0.65,
               label = eq_text, parse = TRUE,
               hjust = 0, vjust = -0.7, size = 5)
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# רשימת כל הגרפים
Delta_O2_Volume_ml_plot <- plot_power_law_simple(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean",
  expression("Volume (mL)"),
  expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")")
)

PR_Volume_ml_plot <- plot_power_law_simple(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "PR_L_hr",
  expression("Volume (mL)"),
  expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")")
)

Rind_Volume_ml_plot <- plot_power_law_simple(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "Rind_umol_hr",
  expression("Volume (mL)"),
  expression("R"["ind"]~ " ("*mu*"mol hr"^{-1}*")")
)

RV_avg_Volume_ml_plot <- plot_power_law_simple(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "RV_umol_hr_ml",
  expression("Volume (mL)"),
  expression(R[V] ~ "(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1}~mL[sponge]^{-1} * ")")
)

PRV_Volume_ml_plot <- plot_power_law_simple(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "PRV_L_hr_ml",
  expression("Volume (mL)"),
  expression(PR[V] ~ "(" * "L hr"^{-1} ~ mL[sponge]^{-1} * ")")
)

osculum_area_sum_Volume_ml_plot <- plot_power_law_simple(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "osculum_area_sum",
  expression("Volume (mL)"),
  expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")")
)

Delta_O2_PRV_plot <- plot_power_law_simple(
  NW_Ind_summary, "PRV_L_hr_ml", "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean",
  expression(PR[V] ~ "(" * "L hr"^{-1} ~ mL[sponge]^{-1} * ")"),
  expression(Delta*O[2]~" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")")
)


Delta_O2_Volume_ml_plot
PR_Volume_ml_plot
Rind_Volume_ml_plot
RV_avg_Volume_ml_plot
PRV_Volume_ml_plot 
osculum_area_sum_Volume_ml_plot 

ggsave("Delta_O2_Volume_ml_plot.png", plot = Delta_O2_Volume_ml_plot, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("PR_Volume_ml_plot.png", plot = PR_Volume_ml_plot, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Rind_Volume_ml_plot.png", plot = Rind_Volume_ml_plot, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("RV_avg_Volume_ml_plot.png", plot = RV_avg_Volume_ml_plot, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
ggsave("PRV_Volume_ml_plot.png", plot = PRV_Volume_ml_plot, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)

ggsave("osculum_area_sum_Volume_ml_plot .png", plot = osculum_area_sum_Volume_ml_plot , width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)



```

# Panel- Volume_Aoroides_df 
```{r, fig.width=22,fig.height=15}
# --- יצירת כל האיורים עם שמות ייחודיים ---

DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

PR_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "PR_L_hr",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "PR_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

Rind_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "Rind_umol_hr",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression("R"["ind"]~ "("*mu*"mol hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "Rind_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

RV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "RV_umol_hr_ml",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression(R[V] ~ "(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1}~mL[sponge]^{-1} * ")"),
  fname = "RV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

PRV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "PRV_L_hr_ml",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression(PR[V] ~ "(" * "L hr"^{-1} ~ mL[sponge]^{-1} * ")"),
  fname = "PRV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

# האיור האחרון - שמור לקובץ, לא נכנס לפאנל!
SumOSA_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "osculum_area_sum",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  fname = "SumOSA_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

# --- בניית פאנל (רק 5 איורים!) ---
panel_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- 
  (DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot + PR_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot + Rind_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot) /
  (RV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot + PRV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot + patchwork::plot_spacer()) +
  patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1))

panel_Volume_Aoroides_plot

# שמירת הפאנל (5 איורים בלבד)
ggsave("Aoroides_5panel.png", plot = panel_Volume_Aoroides_plot, width = 20, height = 12, dpi = 300)

# האיור השישי שמור לבד כבר בתוך הפונקציה (fname = ...)

# אם רוצים לצפות אותו:
SumOSA_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot



```
# Plot- Osc_Osc_Aoroides_df 
```{r, fig.width=10,fig.height=7}


# ⚠️ אל תדרסי את הטבלה המעודכנת בטעינה מחדש:
NW_Med_Osc_summary <- as.data.frame(all_sponge_data$NW_Mediterranean$NW_Med_Osc_summary)

# Theme אחיד
my_plot_theme <- theme(
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
  axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.text = element_text(size = 12)
)

# פונקציה לציור log-log עם קו מגמה ומשוואה (עם הגנות)
plot_powerlaw_single <- function(df, xvar, yvar, xlab, ylab, color="#FF7F00", shape=17, fname=NULL) {
  data_valid <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[xvar]]), !is.na(.data[[yvar]]),
           .data[[xvar]] > 0, .data[[yvar]] > 0)

  # בסיס גרף
  p <- ggplot(data_valid, aes_string(x = xvar, y = yvar)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = color, shape = shape) +
    scale_x_log10() + scale_y_log10() +
    labs(x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    my_plot_theme

  # אם יש מספיק נקודות למודל
  if (nrow(data_valid) >= 3) {
    formula_str <- paste0("log(", yvar, ") ~ log(", xvar, ")")
    model <- try(lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = data_valid), silent = TRUE)
    if (!inherits(model, "try-error")) {
      sm  <- summary(model)
      a   <- exp(coef(model)[1])
      b   <- coef(model)[2]
      r2  <- sm$r.squared
      pval<- sm$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

      if (is.finite(pval) && pval < 0.05 && is.finite(a) && is.finite(b)) {
        x_vals <- seq(min(data_valid[[xvar]]), max(data_valid[[xvar]]), length.out = 100)
        y_vals <- a * x_vals^b
        trend_line <- data.frame(x = x_vals, y = y_vals)
        eq_text <- paste0(
          "italic(y) == ", signif(a, 3), " * x^", signif(b, 3),
          "*','~~italic(R)^2 == ", signif(r2, 3)
        )
        p <- p +
          geom_line(data = trend_line, aes(x = x, y = y),
                    inherit.aes = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", size = 1) +
          annotate("text",
                   x = min(data_valid[[xvar]]) * 1.3,
                   y = max(data_valid[[yvar]]) * 0.78,
                   label = eq_text, parse = TRUE,
                   hjust = 0, vjust = -0.7, size = 5)
      }
    }
  }

  if (!is.null(fname)) ggsave(fname, plot = p, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  p
}

# === דתי־פריים ממוקדים לכל גרף (ללא סינון קשיח כללי) ===

# OFR ~ Osculum Area (לא צריך DeltaO2/Volume)
osc_for_OFR_Area <- NW_Med_Osc_summary %>%
  filter(
    Species == "A.oroides",
    !is.na(osculum_area_mm2), osculum_area_mm2 > 0,
    !is.na(OFR_L_hr_mean),    OFR_L_hr_mean > 0
  )

# Delta O2 ~ Osculum Area (לא צריך Volume ולא OFR)
osc_for_DeltaO2_Area <- NW_Med_Osc_summary %>%
  filter(
    Species == "A.oroides",
    !is.na(osculum_area_mm2),     osculum_area_mm2 > 0,
    !is.na(Delta_O2_umol_L_mean), Delta_O2_umol_L_mean > 0
  )

# Rosc ~ Osculum Area (צריך גם DeltaO2 וגם OFR)
osc_for_Rosc <- NW_Med_Osc_summary %>%
  filter(
    Species == "A.oroides",
    !is.na(osculum_area_mm2),     osculum_area_mm2 > 0,
    !is.na(OFR_L_hr_mean),        OFR_L_hr_mean > 0,
    !is.na(Delta_O2_umol_L_mean), Delta_O2_umol_L_mean > 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(Rosc = Delta_O2_umol_L_mean * OFR_L_hr_mean)

# Osculum Area ~ Volume (לא צריך OFR/DeltaO2)
osc_for_Area_Vol <- NW_Med_Osc_summary %>%
  filter(
    Species == "A.oroides",
    !is.na(osculum_area_mm2), osculum_area_mm2 > 0,
    !is.na(Volume_ml),        Volume_ml > 0
  )

# === יצירת האיורים ===

DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  osc_for_DeltaO2_Area,
  xvar = "osculum_area_mm2",
  yvar = "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean",
  xlab = expression("Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  osc_for_OFR_Area,
  xvar = "osculum_area_mm2",
  yvar = "OFR_L_hr_mean",
  xlab = expression("Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression("OFR (L hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  osc_for_Rosc,
  xvar = "osculum_area_mm2",
  yvar = "Rosc",
  xlab = expression("Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression("R"[osc]~ "("*mu*"mol hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = "Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

OscArea_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  osc_for_Area_Vol,
  xvar = "Volume_ml",
  yvar = "osculum_area_mm2",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression("Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  fname = "OscArea_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot.png"
)

# צפייה ישירה אם רוצים
# DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot
# OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot
# Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot
# OscArea_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot


```

# Panel- Osc_Osc_Aoroides_df 
```{r, fig.width=11,fig.height=10}

# ====== Panel - Osc_Osc_Aoroides_df ======

# גרסאות ללא מקרא (אין בעצם צבעים/מקרא, אבל נשאיר תאימות)
DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg <- DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot + theme(legend.position = "none")
OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg    <- OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot + theme(legend.position = "none")
Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg   <- Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot + theme(legend.position = "none")

# אם בכל זאת נוצר מקרא, נחלץ אותו; אם לא – נשים spacer
leg_try <- try(get_legend(
  DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot + theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.key.size  = unit(0.35, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.01, "cm"),
    legend.margin    = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    legend.box.margin= margin(0, 0, 0, 0)
  )
), silent = TRUE)

legend_Osc_Aoroides <- if (inherits(leg_try, "try-error") || is.null(leg_try)) plot_spacer() else wrap_elements(leg_try)

# שורות לפאנל
bottom_row_Osc_Aoroides <- Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg + plot_spacer() + legend_Osc_Aoroides
bottom_row_Osc_Aoroides <- bottom_row_Osc_Aoroides + plot_layout(widths = c(0.6, 0.05, 0.35))

top_row_Osc_Aoroides <- DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg + OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg + plot_spacer()
top_row_Osc_Aoroides <- top_row_Osc_Aoroides + plot_layout(widths = c(1, 1, 0.05))

# פאנל סופי (האזור Volume~Area לא נכנס כאן לפי הבקשה המקורית)
multi_panel_Osc_Aoroides_plot <-
  top_row_Osc_Aoroides /
  bottom_row_Osc_Aoroides +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", heights = c(1, 1))

# צפייה ושמירה
multi_panel_Osc_Aoroides_plot

ggsave(
  "Aoroides_Osculum_area_3panel.png",
  plot = multi_panel_Osc_Aoroides_plot,
  width = 11, height = 10, dpi = 300
)


```


```{r, fig.width=12,fig.height=6}


panel <- plot_grid(
  OscArea_vs_Volume_Aoroides_noleg,
  SumOSA_vs_Volume_Aoroides_noleg,
  labels = c("A", "B"),
  label_size = 18,
  nrow = 1,
  align = "hv",
  rel_widths = c(1, 1.1)  # הגדלת איור B (הימני)
)
panel

ggsave("Panel_OscSum_vs_Volume_Aoroides_cowplot_wideB.png", panel, width = 12, height = 6, dpi = 300)


```

# פאנל הסרת חמצן אגלס 
```{r, fig.width=18,fig.height=6}

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# שמות האיורים שצריכים להיות בסביבה
needed <- c(
  "DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot",
  "DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg",
  "DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot"
)

miss <- needed[!sapply(needed, exists, inherits = TRUE)]
if (length(miss)) stop("חסרים האיורים: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

# הסרת מקרא
p1 <- DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot + theme(legend.position = "none")
p2 <- DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg + theme(legend.position = "none")
p3 <- DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot + theme(legend.position = "none")

# פאנל 3 בשורה (בלי שימוש ב-&)
panel_3plots <-
  (p1 | p2 | p3) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") +
  theme(
    plot.tag = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA)
  )

# הצגה
panel_3plots

# שמירה
ggsave(
  filename = "DeltaO2_Aoroides_3panel.png",
  plot     = panel_3plots,
  width    = 18,
  height   = 6,
  dpi      = 300,
  bg       = "white"
)

```
# Panel- כללי רק לאגלס 
```{r, fig.width=19,fig.height=31}

# -------- טור 1: שלושה איורים, רק התחתון עם ציר X, שמות ייחודיים --------
panel_col1_aoroides <- (
  (DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg + labs(x = NULL)) /
  (OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg     + labs(x = NULL)) /
  Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg /
  plot_spacer() /
  plot_spacer() /
  plot_spacer()
) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(0.26, 0.26, 0.26, 0.17, 0.17, 0.17)) # 3 איורים, 3 spacer

# -------- טור 2 --------
panel_col2_aoroides <- (
  (DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg  + labs(x = NULL)) /
  (PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg       + labs(x = NULL)) /
  (Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg     + labs(x = NULL)) /
  (PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg + labs(x = NULL)) /
  RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg
)

# -------- טור 3 --------
panel_col3_aoroides <- (
  (DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot + labs(x = NULL)) /
  (PR_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot      + labs(x = NULL)) /
  (Rind_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot    + labs(x = NULL)) /
  (PRV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot     + labs(x = NULL)) /
  RV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot
)

# -------- פאנל סופי --------
# כל שורה (שני/שלישי טור) – דוגמה כללית
row1 <- DeltaO2_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg | DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg | DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot
row2 <- OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg     | PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg      | PR_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot
row3 <- Rosc_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_noleg    | Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg    | Rind_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot
row4 <- plot_spacer()                     | PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg| PRV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot
row5 <- plot_spacer()                     | RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel_noleg | RV_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot

big_panel_plot_aoroides <-
  row1 / row2 / row3 / row4 / row5 +
  plot_layout(
    guides = "collect",
    heights = rep(1, 5)
  ) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20))
  )



big_panel_plot_aoroides

# ---- שמירה ----
ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/big_3col_panel_final_aoroides.png",
  plot = big_panel_plot_aoroides,
  width = 19, height = 31, dpi = 300
)





```

#פאנל קצב שאיבה רק לאגלס
```{r, fig.width=10,fig.height=7}
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(grid)

# 1) בדיקה שהאובייקטים קיימים
needed <- c(
  "PR_Volume_ml_plot", "PRV_Volume_ml_plot",
  "OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot", "PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel"
)

miss <- needed[!sapply(needed, exists, inherits = TRUE)]
if (length(miss)) stop("חסרים האיורים: ", paste(miss, collapse = ", "))

# 2) בלי מקרא בכל אחד
pA <- OFR_vs_OscArea_Aoroides_plot + theme(legend.position = "none")
pB <- PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel  + theme(legend.position = "none")
pC <- PR_Volume_ml_plot            + theme(legend.position = "none")
pD <- PRV_Volume_ml_plot           + theme(legend.position = "none")

# 3) Theme גדול לצירים/כותרות
big_axes <- theme(
  axis.title   = element_text(size = 22),
  axis.text    = element_text(size = 18),
  strip.text   = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
  axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 8)),
  axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 8)),
  plot.tag     = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
  panel.spacing   = unit(1.2, "lines")
)

# 4) מוסיפים את ה-theme לכל גרף מראש
pA_big <- pA + big_axes
pB_big <- pB + big_axes
pC_big <- pC + big_axes
pD_big <- pD + big_axes

# 5) פאנל 2x2
panel_no_legend_big <-
  ((pA_big | pB_big) /
   (pC_big | pD_big)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A")

# הצגה
panel_no_legend_big

# שמירה
ggsave(
  filename = "panel_no_legend_big.png",
  plot     = panel_no_legend_big,
  width    = 12,
  height   = 12,
  dpi      = 300,
  bg       = "white"
)
```
###קוד שצריך לעשות בו סדר הוא לא יעבוד עכשיו 

```{r, fig.width=10,fig.height=7}

Underwater_data<-read_rds("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/Underwater_summary_data.rds")


Underwater_summary_data <- Underwater_data %>%
  mutate(
    Total_OFR = mean_OFR_L_hr,  # מכיוון שאין קבוצות נוספות, השאר כערך המקורי
    Pumping_rate = Total_OFR / Species_volume,
    Total_respiration = Total_OFR * mean_delta,
    Specific_respiration = Pumping_rate * mean_delta
  )
```

```{r, fig.width=25,fig.height=35}

# 🎨 גרף סדרות זמן עם צבעים קבועים לפי מין
Eilat_Time_Series_plot <- ggplot(Eilat_clean, aes(x = DateTime, y = Delta_O2, color = Species_name)) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +  # קו סדרת זמן
  facet_wrap(~ Oscula, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +  # שולטת במספר עמודות
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "C.cyathophora"  = "#4DAF4A",
    "C.siphonella"   = "#377EB8",
    "D.erythraeanus" = "#A65628",
    "N.rowi"         = "#984EA3",
    "S.clavatus"     = "#EEB422",
    "T.swinhoei"     = "#E41A1C",
    "A.oroides"      = "#FF7F00"
  )) +
   scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%H:%M") +  # 🟢 מציג רק שעה
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    color = ""
  ) +
theme(
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),  # 🟢 נטוי
  legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
  legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
  legend.position = c(0.6, 0.04),  # 🟢 ימין למטה – אפשר לשחק עם המספרים
  panel.background = element_blank(), 
  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
  strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 15)  # 🟢 לא נטוי יותר
)


# 🟢 שמירת האיור
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/Eilat_Time_Series_plot.png",
       plot = Eilat_Time_Series_plot, width = 25, height = 35 , dpi = 300)

# הצגה
Eilat_Time_Series_plot

```

```{r, fig.width=25,fig.height=35}


# שלב 1: עיגול כל 3 שעות
Eilat_clean <- Eilat_clean %>%
  mutate(
    Hour = as.numeric(format(DateTime, "%H")),
    Hour_bin = floor(Hour / 3) * 3,
    Time_bin_label = sprintf("%02d:00", Hour_bin)  # יוצר טקסט בצורה "03:00"
  )


Eilat_clean <- Eilat_clean %>%
  mutate(Time_bin_hms = hms::as_hms(Hour_bin * 3600))  # המרה לשעות בפורמט hms


# שלב 2: חישוב סטטיסטיקות
Eilat_Oscula_3h_summary <- Eilat_clean %>%
  group_by(Species_name, Individual, Oscula, Time_bin_hms) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(Delta_O2)),                               # מספר מדידות
    mean_Delta_O2 = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),            # ממוצע
    median_Delta_O2 = median(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),        # חציון
    sd_Delta_O2 = sd(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),                # סטיית תקן
    SE_Delta_O2 = sd_Delta_O2 / sqrt(n),                     # שגיאת תקן (SE)
    CI95_Delta_O2 = 1.96 * SE_Delta_O2,                      # רווח סמך 95%
    CV_Delta_O2 = (sd_Delta_O2 / mean_Delta_O2) * 100,       # מקדם השתנות (CV%)
    mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE),                    # טמפ' ממוצעת (אם חשוב)
    .groups = "drop"
  )

Eilat_Oscula_3h_plot <- ggplot(Eilat_Oscula_3h_summary, aes(x = Time_bin_hms, y = mean_Delta_O2, color = Species_name)) +
  # ✅ רקע אפור לשעות החשכה
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 0), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 6),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 18), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 24),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # ✅ שאר הגרף שלך (בלי שינוי)
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_Delta_O2 - CI95_Delta_O2, ymax = mean_Delta_O2 + CI95_Delta_O2, fill = Species_name),
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~ Oscula, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    x = "Time of Day (binned every 3 hours)",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  scale_x_time(
    breaks = hms::hms(hours = seq(0, 24, by = 3)),
    labels = scales::label_time(format = "%H:%M")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "C.cyathophora"  = "#4DAF4A",
    "C.siphonella"   = "#377EB8",
    "D.erythraeanus" = "#A65628",
    "N.rowi"         = "#984EA3",
    "S.clavatus"     = "#EEB422",
    "T.swinhoei"     = "#E41A1C",
    "A.oroides"      = "#FF7F00"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "C.cyathophora"  = "#4DAF4A",
    "C.siphonella"   = "#377EB8",
    "D.erythraeanus" = "#A65628",
    "N.rowi"         = "#984EA3",
    "S.clavatus"     = "#EEB422",
    "T.swinhoei"     = "#E41A1C",
    "A.oroides"      = "#FF7F00"
  )) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.position = c(0.6, 0.04),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )



# 🟢 שמירת האיור
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/Eilat_Oscula_3h_plot.png",
       plot = Eilat_Oscula_3h_plot, width = 25, height = 35 , dpi = 300)



Eilat_Oscula_3h_plot




```



```{r, fig.width=15,fig.height=10}



Eilat_Species_3h_summary <- Eilat_clean %>%
  group_by(Species_name, Time_bin_hms) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(Delta_O2)),
    mean_Delta_O2 = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_Delta_O2 = median(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_Delta_O2 = sd(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE_Delta_O2 = sd_Delta_O2 / sqrt(n),
    CI95_Delta_O2 = 1.96 * SE_Delta_O2,
    CV_Delta_O2 = (sd_Delta_O2 / mean_Delta_O2) * 100,
    mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )




Eilat_Species_3h_plot <- ggplot(Eilat_Species_3h_summary, aes(x = Time_bin_hms, y = mean_Delta_O2, color = Species_name, fill = Species_name)) +
  # רקע אפור לשעות החשכה
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 0), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 6),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 18), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 24),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # שאר הגרף
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_Delta_O2 - CI95_Delta_O2, ymax = mean_Delta_O2 + CI95_Delta_O2), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species_name, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +  # ✅ חלוקה לפי מין
  labs(
    x = "Time of Day (binned every 3 hours)",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  scale_x_time(
    breaks = hms::hms(hours = seq(0, 24, by = 3)),
    labels = scales::label_time(format = "%H:%M")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "C.cyathophora"  = "#4DAF4A",
    "C.siphonella"   = "#377EB8",
    "D.erythraeanus" = "#A65628",
    "N.rowi"         = "#984EA3",
    "S.clavatus"     = "#EEB422",
    "T.swinhoei"     = "#E41A1C",
    "A.oroides"      = "#FF7F00"
  )) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "C.cyathophora"  = "#4DAF4A",
    "C.siphonella"   = "#377EB8",
    "D.erythraeanus" = "#A65628",
    "N.rowi"         = "#984EA3",
    "S.clavatus"     = "#EEB422",
    "T.swinhoei"     = "#E41A1C",
    "A.oroides"      = "#FF7F00"
  )) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.position = c(0.5, 0.1),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "italic")
  )



# 🟢 שמירת האיור
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/Eilat_Species_3h_plot.png",
       plot = Eilat_Species_3h_plot, width = 15, height = 10 , dpi = 300)



Eilat_Species_3h_plot




```


```{r, fig.width=25,fig.height=35}


# ✅ הגדרת צבעים
species_colors <- c(
  "C.cyathophora"   = "#BAD6D3",
  "C.siphonella"    = "#939ECC",
  "D.erythraeanus"  = "#A65628",
  "N.rowi"          = "#377EB8",
  "S.clavatus"      = "#EEB422",
  "T.swinhoei"      = "#8B2323",
  "A.oroides"       = "#FF7F00",
  "C.reniformis"    = "#BD9D80",
  "D.avara"         = "#A680BD",
  "M.fistulifera"   = "#E41A1C"
  
)



DeltaO2_data <- DeltaO2_data %>%
  mutate(Species = case_when(
    Species_name == "Dysidea avara"         ~ "D.avara",
    Species_name == "Agelas oroides"        ~ "A.oroides",
    Species_name == "Chondrosia reniformis" ~ "C.reniformis",
    TRUE                                    ~ NA_character_  # למקרה שיש עוד מינים
  ))


# ✅ שלב 1: ציור סדרת הזמן המלאה (כל נקודה)
DeltaO2_Unique_Code_Time_Series_plot <- ggplot(DeltaO2_data, aes(x = DateTime, y = Delta_O2, color = Species)) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ Unique_Code, scales = "free_x", ncol = 4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = species_colors) +
  scale_x_datetime(date_labels = "%H:%M") +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    color = ""
  ) +
theme(
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),  # 🟢 נטוי
  legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
  legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
  legend.position = "bottom",  # מקרא למטה
  legend.justification = "center",  # מיושר למרכז
  legend.box = "horizontal",  # פריסה אופקית של המקרא
  panel.background = element_blank(), 
  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
  strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 15)  # 🟢 לא נטוי יותר
)


# ✅ הצגת הגרף
DeltaO2_Unique_Code_Time_Series_plot

# ✅ שמירת הגרף
ggsave("DeltaO2_Unique_Code_Time_Series_plot.png",
       plot = DeltaO2_Unique_Code_Time_Series_plot, width = 25, height = 35, dpi = 300)


# ✅ שלב 2: עיבוד זמן (עיגול כל 3 שעות)
DeltaO2_data <- DeltaO2_data %>%
  mutate(
    Hour = as.numeric(format(DateTime, "%H")),
    Hour_bin = floor(Hour / 3) * 3,
    Time_bin_label = sprintf("%02d:00", Hour_bin)  # יוצר טקסט בצורה "03:00"
  )


DeltaO2_data <- DeltaO2_data %>%
  mutate(Time_bin_hms = hms::as_hms(Hour_bin * 3600))  # המרה לשעות בפורמט hms



# ✅ חישוב סטטיסטיקות לכל Oscula ושעת בינון
DeltaO2_Unique_Code_3h_summary <- DeltaO2_data %>%
  group_by(Unique_Code, Species, Individual, Oscula, Time_bin_hms) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(Delta_O2)),
    mean_Delta_O2 = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_Delta_O2 = sd(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE_Delta_O2 = sd_Delta_O2 / sqrt(n),
    CI95_Delta_O2 = 1.96 * SE_Delta_O2,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ✅ ציור גרף ממוצע לכל Oscula (לפי 3 שעות)
DeltaO2_Unique_Code_3h_plot <- ggplot(DeltaO2_Unique_Code_3h_summary, 
                           aes(x = Time_bin_hms, y = mean_Delta_O2, color = Species)) +
  # ✅ רקע אפור לשעות החשכה
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 0), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 6),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 18), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 24),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # ✅ שאר הגרף שלך (בלי שינוי)
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_Delta_O2 - CI95_Delta_O2, ymax = mean_Delta_O2 + CI95_Delta_O2, fill = Species),
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  facet_wrap(~ Unique_Code, scales = "free", ncol = 4) +
  labs(
    x = "Time of Day (binned every 3 hours)",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  scale_x_time(
    breaks = hms::hms(hours = seq(0, 24, by = 3)),
    labels = scales::label_time(format = "%H:%M")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(species_colors)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(species_colors)) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),  # 🟢 נטוי
    legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "bottom",  # מקרא למטה
    legend.justification = "center",  # מיושר למרכז
    legend.box = "horizontal",  # פריסה אופקית של המקרא
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15)
  )


# ✅ הצגת הגרף
DeltaO2_Unique_Code_3h_plot

# ✅ שמירת הגרף
ggsave("DeltaO2_Unique_Code_3h_plot.png",
       plot = DeltaO2_Unique_Code_3h_plot, width = 25, height = 35, dpi = 300)



```



```{r, fig.width=15,fig.height=10}



DeltaO2_Species_3h_summary <- DeltaO2_data %>%
  group_by(Species, Time_bin_hms) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(Delta_O2)),
    mean_Delta_O2 = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_Delta_O2 = median(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_Delta_O2 = sd(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE_Delta_O2 = sd_Delta_O2 / sqrt(n),
    CI95_Delta_O2 = 1.96 * SE_Delta_O2,
    CV_Delta_O2 = (sd_Delta_O2 / mean_Delta_O2) * 100,
    mean_Temp = mean(Temp, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )




DeltaO2_Species_3h_plot <- ggplot(DeltaO2_Species_3h_summary, aes(x = Time_bin_hms, y = mean_Delta_O2, color = Species, fill = Species)) +
  # רקע אפור לשעות החשכה
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 0), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 6),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 18), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 24),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  
  # שאר הגרף
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_Delta_O2 - CI95_Delta_O2, ymax = mean_Delta_O2 + CI95_Delta_O2), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +  # ✅ חלוקה לפי מין
  labs(
    x = "Time of Day (binned every 3 hours)",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  scale_x_time(
    breaks = hms::hms(hours = seq(0, 24, by = 3)),
    labels = scales::label_time(format = "%H:%M")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(species_colors)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(species_colors)) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),  # 🟢 נטוי
    legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "bottom",  # מקרא למטה
    legend.justification = "center",  # מיושר למרכז
    legend.box = "horizontal",  # פריסה אופקית של המקרא
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "italic")
  )



# 🟢 שמירת האיור
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/DeltaO2_Species_3h_plot.png",
       plot = DeltaO2_Species_3h_plot, width = 15, height = 10 , dpi = 300)



DeltaO2_Species_3h_plot




```


```{r, fig.width=16,fig.height=10}


# ✅ שלב 1: ניקוי קובץ DeltaO2_Species_3h_summary
DeltaO2_Species_3h_summary <- DeltaO2_Species_3h_summary %>%
  as_tibble() %>%           # הסרת rowwise (אם היה)
  ungroup() %>%             # ביטול קבוצות
  mutate(
    Species = factor(Species, levels = c("A.oroides", "D.avara", "C.reniformis"))
  )

# ✅ שלב 2: ניקוי קובץ Eilat_Species_3h_summary
Eilat_Species_3h_summary <- Eilat_Species_3h_summary %>%
  as_tibble() %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    mean_Temp = na_if(mean_Temp, -300),  # הסרת טמפרטורות שגויות
    Species = as.character(Species_name),  # יצירת עמודה Species תואמת
    Species = factor(Species, levels = c("C.cyathophora", "C.siphonella", "D.erythraeanus",
                                         "N.rowi", "S.clavatus", "T.swinhoei", "A.oroides"))  # לפי סדר המינים שלך
  ) 

# ✅ שלב 3: איחוד הקבצים
combined_Species_3h_summary <- bind_rows(DeltaO2_Species_3h_summary, Eilat_Species_3h_summary)

combined_Species_3h_summary <-combined_Species_3h_summary %>%
  filter(!is.na(Species))




combined_Species_3h_plot <- ggplot(combined_Species_3h_summary, aes(x = Time_bin_hms, y = mean_Delta_O2, color = Species, fill = Species)) +
  # רקע אפור לשעות החשכה
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 0), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 6),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  annotate("rect",
           xmin = hms::hms(hours = 18), xmax = hms::hms(hours = 24),
           ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf,
           fill = "grey90", alpha = 0.5) +
  # שאר הגרף
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_Delta_O2 - CI95_Delta_O2, ymax = mean_Delta_O2 + CI95_Delta_O2), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Time of Day (binned every 3 hours)",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    color = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
  scale_x_time(
    breaks = hms::hms(hours = seq(0, 24, by = 3)),
    labels = scales::label_time(format = "%H:%M")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = species_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = species_colors) +
#  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 50)) +  # ✅ הגבלת ציר Y
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "italic")
  )



# ✅ שמירת הגרף
ggsave("combined_Species_3h_plot.png",
       plot = combined_Species_3h_plot, width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)


combined_Species_3h_plot


```



```{r, fig.width=16,fig.height=10}

# ✅ שלב 1: התאמת עמודות והוספת עמודת מקור (Dataset)
DeltaO2_data_clean <- DeltaO2_data %>%
   dplyr::select(-Oscula) %>%
   rename( Oscula = Unique_Code) %>%
   dplyr::select(Species, Individual, Oscula, DateTime, Temp, O2_In, O2_Ex, Delta_O2) %>%
  mutate(Dataset = "NW_Mediterranean")

Eilat_clean_clean <- Eilat_clean %>%
  rename(Species = Species_name) %>%
   dplyr::select(Species , Individual, Oscula, DateTime, Temp, O2_In, O2_Ex, Delta_O2) %>%
  mutate(
    Species = as.character(Species),  # מייצרת עמודת Species (טקסט)
    Oscula = as.character(Oscula),
    Dataset = "Red_Sea_2018_2019"
  )

# ✅ שלב 2: איחוד שני הקבצים
combined_forCV_data <- bind_rows(DeltaO2_data_clean, Eilat_clean_clean)


# ✅ הוספת טור "Hour" לשעה עגולה
combined_forCV_data <- combined_forCV_data %>%
  mutate(Hour = lubridate::hour(DateTime))

# ✅ חישוב סטטיסטיקות ממוצעות שעתיות לכל Species + Dataset
CV_hourly_stats <- combined_forCV_data %>%
  group_by(Species, Dataset, Hour) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(!is.na(Delta_O2)),  # מספר מדידות
    mean_Delta_O2 = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_Delta_O2 = median(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_Delta_O2 = sd(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE_Delta_O2 = sd_Delta_O2 / sqrt(n),
    CI95_Delta_O2 = 1.96 * SE_Delta_O2,
    CV_Delta_O2 = (sd_Delta_O2 / abs(mean_Delta_O2)) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

CV_hourly_all_plot<- ggplot(CV_hourly_stats, aes(x = Species, y = CV_Delta_O2, fill = Species)) +
  geom_violin(scale = "width", alpha = 0.7, color = "black") +
 # geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.5) +  # תיבה בפנים
  #facet_wrap(~ Species, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) +
  scale_y_log10() +  # ציר Y לוגריתמי
  scale_fill_manual(values = species_colors) +  # הצבעים שלך
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "CV (%)",
    title = "",
    fill = ""
  ) +
 theme(
  panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
  legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),
  legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
  legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
  legend.position = "bottom",
  legend.justification = "center",
  legend.box = "horizontal",
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
  strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
  axis.title = element_text(size = 20),  # ✅ כותרות צירים מוגדלות
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),  # ✅ טקסט בציר Y מוגדל
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15 , face = "italic" ),  # ✅ טקסט בציר X מוגדל
  strip.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "italic")
)


# ✅ שמירת הגרף
ggsave("CV_hourly_all_plot.png",
       plot = CV_hourly_all_plot, width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)



CV_hourly_all_plot

```

```{r, fig.width=16,fig.height=10}

# שלב 1: הוספת עמודת Light_darkness
combined_Light_darkness_data <- combined_forCV_data %>%
  mutate(
    Light_darkness = if_else(Hour >= 7 & Hour < 20, "Light", "Darkness")
  )

# שלב 2: סינון רק מינים שיש להם גם Light וגם Darkness
species_with_both <- combined_Light_darkness_data %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(n_groups = n_distinct(Light_darkness)) %>%
  filter(n_groups == 2) %>%
  pull(Species)

combined_Light_darkness_data <- combined_Light_darkness_data %>%
  filter(Species %in% species_with_both)

summary_per_individual <- combined_Light_darkness_data %>%
  group_by(Species, Individual, Light_darkness) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_Delta_O2 = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_Delta_O2 = median(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_Delta_O2 = sd(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE),
    SE_Delta_O2 = sd_Delta_O2 / sqrt(n),
    CI95_Delta_O2 = 1.96 * SE_Delta_O2,
    CV_Delta_O2 = (sd_Delta_O2 / mean_Delta_O2) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


# שלב 3: חישוב ממוצעים לכל Species ולכל Light_darkness
mean_points <- summary_per_individual  %>%
  rename(Delta_O2 = mean_Delta_O2) %>%
  group_by(Species, Light_darkness) %>%
  summarise(mean_Delta_O2 = mean(Delta_O2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# שלב 4: מבחן Wilcoxon לכל מין צריך להשלים!!!!!




# חישוב מיקום הכוכביות (גובה מותאם לכל מין)
stat_results <- stat_results %>%
  mutate(y_pos = sapply(Species, function(sp) {
    max(combined_Light_darkness_data$Delta_O2[combined_Light_darkness_data$Species == sp], na.rm = TRUE) * 1.05
  }))

# שלב 5: ציור Boxplot עם ממוצעים וכוכביות
boxplot_with_stats <- ggplot( summary_per_individual, aes(x = Species, y = mean_Delta_O2, fill = Light_darkness)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75),
               color = "black", size = 1.2) +  # ✅ קווי קופסה שחורים ועבים
  geom_point(data = mean_points, aes(x = Species, y = mean_Delta_O2, color = Light_darkness, group = Light_darkness),
             shape = 4, size = 4, stroke = 2, inherit.aes = FALSE, position = position_dodge(width = 0.75)) +  # ✅ X מדויקת לכל מצב
  geom_text(data = stat_results, aes(x = Species, y = y_pos, label = significance),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 6) +  # ✅ כוכביות מובהקות
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Light" = "gold", "Darkness" = "gray40")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Light" = "black", "Darkness" = "black")) +  # ✅ X תמיד שחור
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05)), limits = c(0, 40)) +  # ✅ ציר Y מ-0 עד 40
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = expression(Delta * O[2] * " (µmol L"^{-1}*")"),
    fill = "",
    color = ""
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA, size = 20),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20, face = "italic"),
    legend.key.size = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(1, "cm"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.box = "horizontal",
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", size = 1.5, linetype = "solid"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, face = "italic")
  )


# ✅ שמירת הגרף
ggsave("boxplot_with_stats.png",
       plot = boxplot_with_stats, width = 16, height = 10, dpi = 300)


# הצגת הגרף
boxplot_with_stats

```

##summary_table
```{r, fig.width=16,fig.height=10}



# פונקציה לחישוב CI95
calc_ci95 <- function(x) {
  if (length(x) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  qt(0.975, df = length(x) - 1) * sd(x, na.rm=TRUE) / sqrt(length(x))
}

# רשימת הפרמטרים ושמותיהם להצגה
params <- list(
  Volume_ml        = "Volume (mL)",
  osculum_area_sum = "SumOSA (mm²)",
  Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean = "DeltaO2 (µmol L⁻¹)",
  PR_L_hr          = "PR (L hr⁻¹)",
  PRV_L_hr_ml      = "PRV (L hr⁻¹ mL⁻¹)",
  Rind_umol_hr     = "Rind (µmol hr⁻¹)",
  RV_umol_hr_ml    = "RV (µmol hr⁻¹ mL⁻¹)"
)

# אוספים summary לכל פרמטר
summary_list <- lapply(names(params), function(param) {
  Ind_summary_df %>%
    group_by(Species, Dataset) %>%
    summarise(
      Mean   = mean(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE),
      Median = median(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE),
      SD     = sd(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE),
      n      = sum(!is.na(.data[[param]])),
      CI95   = calc_ci95(.data[[param]]),
      CV     = ifelse(mean(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE) == 0, NA,
                      100 * sd(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE) / abs(mean(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE))),
      Min    = min(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE),
      Max    = max(.data[[param]], na.rm=TRUE)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(Parameter = params[[param]])
})


# מאחדים הכל לטבלה אחת
summary_table <- bind_rows(summary_list) %>%
  relocate(Parameter, .after = Dataset)

# סדר עמודות כמו בדוגמה
summary_table <- summary_table %>%
  dplyr::select(Species, Dataset, Parameter, Mean, Median, SD, n, CI95, CV, Min, Max)

# מציגים דוגמית
write.csv(summary_table,"summary_table.csv")

```


#טבלה לפרק שיטות 
```{r, fig.width=16,fig.height=10}

methods_table <- DeltaO2_combined %>%
  mutate(
    Year      = lubridate::year(DateTime),
    Month_num = lubridate::month(DateTime)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species_name, Dataset, Year) %>%
  summarise(
    n    = n_distinct(Individual),
    Temp = paste0(round(min(Temp, na.rm=TRUE)), "-", round(max(Temp, na.rm=TRUE))),
    Month = paste0(month.name[min(Month_num, na.rm=TRUE)],
                   ifelse(min(Month_num, na.rm=TRUE) != max(Month_num, na.rm=TRUE), 
                          paste0("-", month.name[max(Month_num, na.rm=TRUE)]), "")),
    Depth = paste0(min(as.numeric(Depth_m), na.rm=TRUE), 
                   ifelse(min(as.numeric(Depth_m), na.rm=TRUE) != max(as.numeric(Depth_m), na.rm=TRUE),
                          paste0("-", max(as.numeric(Depth_m), na.rm=TRUE)), "")),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Location = ifelse(grepl("Mediterranean", Dataset), "NW Mediterranean", "Red Sea")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Species = Species_name, Dataset, Location, Year, Month, n, Temp, `Depth(m)` = Depth
  )

methods_table2 <- methods_table %>%
  left_join(volume_ranges, by = c("Species", "Dataset"))

write.csv(methods_table2, "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_3_Size/methods_table2.csv", row.names = FALSE)



group_summary <- Osculum_Ind_summary_table %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(n_individuals, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Volume = mean(Volume_ml, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_OFR = mean(avg_OFR_L_hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Delta_O2 = mean(avg_Delta_O2_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_PR = mean(avg_PR_L_hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Rind = mean(avg_Rind_umol_hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_RV = mean(avg_RV_umol_hr_ml, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_SumOSA = mean(avg_osculum_area_mm2_sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_species = n_distinct(Species),
    PRv = mean_PR / mean_Volume,                # <--- זה PRv ל־Group
    Rind_calc = mean_PR * mean_Delta_O2         # <--- זה Rind מחושב ל־Group
  )


# הוספת עמודות מחושבות לכל שורה, כדי שממוצע הקבוצה יחושב נכון (ולא לפי ממוצע-הממוצעים)
SizeClass_Ind_summary_table <- SizeClass_Ind_summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    PRv = avg_PR_L_hr / avg_Volume_ml,                 # PRv לכל שורה
    Rind_calc = avg_PR_L_hr * avg_Delta_O2_umol_L      # Rind מחושב לכל שורה
  )

# טבלת סיכום לפי Group
sizeclass_group_summary <- SizeClass_Ind_summary_table %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%
  summarise(
    n = sum(n_individuals, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Volume = mean(avg_Volume_ml, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_Volume = sd(avg_Volume_ml, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_PR = mean(avg_PR_L_hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_DeltaO2 = mean(avg_Delta_O2_umol_L, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_OFR = mean(avg_OFR_L_hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_Rind = mean(avg_Rind_umol_hr, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_RV = mean(avg_RV_umol_hr_ml, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_SumOSA = mean(avg_osculum_area_mm2_sum, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_HMA_LMA = unique(HMA_LMA),
    mean_PRv = mean(PRv, na.rm = TRUE),                  # ממוצע PRv לכל Group
    mean_Rind_calc = mean(Rind_calc, na.rm = TRUE)        # ממוצע Rind מחושב לכל Group
  ) %>%
  arrange(Group)



```

```{r, fig.width=16,fig.height=10}
  filter(Dataset != "Red_Sea_2024" | is.na(Dataset))

# שמירת הטבלה ללא Red_Sea_2024
readr::write_csv(
  Ind_summary_noRS2024,
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Chapter_2_F&R/Ind_summary_noRS2024.csv"
)

# בדיקה שהשמירה הצליחה
```
