###איורים למצגת 

```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}
## ===== ΔO2 vs Volume – גרסת מצגת: HMA/LMA, לג'נד מוגדל ורקע שקוף =====

# 1. צורות עבור HMA / LMA (מחליף זמנית את ההגדרה הקודמת)
shape_values_updated <- c(
  "HMA" = 19,  # עיגול ממולא
  "LMA" = 1    # עיגול ריק
)

# 2. תוויות איטלקיות לשמות המינים בלג'נד (לפי הסדר ב-species_colors)
species_labels_italics <- c(
  expression(italic("C. cyathophora")),
  expression(italic("C. siphonella")),
  expression(italic("D. erythraeanus")),
  expression(italic("N. rowi")),
  expression(italic("S. clavatus")),
  expression(italic("T. swinhoei")),
  expression(italic("A. oroides")),
  expression(italic("C. reniformis")),
  expression(italic("D. avara")),
  expression(italic("M. fistulifera"))
)

# 3. טבלה שבה Dataset = HMA_LMA (כדי להשתמש בפונקציה הקיימת)
SizeClass_Ind_summary_table_HMA <- SizeClass_Ind_summary_table %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Dataset = HMA_LMA)

# 4. יצירת הגרף עם HMA/LMA, לג'נד באיטליקס ורקע שקוף
DeltaO2_vs_Volume_plot_HMA_transparent <-
  plot_power_law(
    df   = SizeClass_Ind_summary_table_HMA,
    xvar = "avg_Volume_ml",
    yvar = "avg_Delta_O2_umol_L",
    xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
    ylab = expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  labs(shape = "Type") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = species_colors,
    breaks = names(species_colors),   # כדי שהסדר יתאים לצבעים
    labels = species_labels_italics   # שמות המינים באיטליקס
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    plot.background   = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
     axis.title.y=element_text(size=20),
     axis.title.x=element_text(size=20),
     axis.text.y = element_text(size=10),
     axis.text.x = element_text(size=10),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    legend.key        = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 15, face = "plain"),
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 16)
  )

# הצגה על המסך
DeltaO2_vs_Volume_plot_HMA_transparent

# 5. שמירה לקובץ PNG עם רקע שקוף
ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/DeltaO2_vs_Volume_plot_HMA_transparent.png",
  plot   = DeltaO2_vs_Volume_plot_HMA_transparent,
  width  = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "transparent"
)


```

```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}
## ==== OFR vs Osculum area – גרסת מצגת: HMA/LMA, לג'נד מוגדל ורקע שקוף ==== 

# 1. טבלה חדשה שבה Dataset מקבל את הערכים של HMA_LMA
Osculum_summary_table_HMA <- Osculum_summary_table %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Dataset = HMA_LMA)

# 2. צורות חדשות: HMA עיגול מלא, LMA עיגול ריק
shape_values_updated <- c(
  "HMA" = 19,  # עיגול ממולא
  "LMA" = 1    # עיגול ריק
)

# 3. תוויות איטלקיות לשמות המינים בלג'נד (אותו סדר כמו ב-species_colors)
species_labels_italics <- c(
  expression(italic("C. cyathophora")),
  expression(italic("C. siphonella")),
  expression(italic("D. erythraeanus")),
  expression(italic("N. rowi")),
  expression(italic("S. clavatus")),
  expression(italic("T. swinhoei")),
  expression(italic("A. oroides")),
  expression(italic("C. reniformis")),
  expression(italic("D. avara")),
  expression(italic("M. fistulifera"))
)

# 4. גרף OFR מול שטח אוסקולה עם קבוצות HMA/LMA, לג'נד באיטליקס ורקע שקוף
OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot_HMA_transparent <-
  plot_power_law(
    df   = Osculum_summary_table_HMA,
    xvar = "avg_osculum_area_mm2",
    yvar = "avg_OFR_L_hr",
    xlab = expression("Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
    ylab = expression("OFR (L "*h^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  labs(shape = "Type") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = species_colors,
    breaks = names(species_colors),   # אותו סדר כמו בצבעים
    labels = species_labels_italics   # שמות המינים באיטליקס
  ) +
  theme(
    panel.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    plot.background   = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    axis.title.y      = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.title.x      = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    legend.key        = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
    legend.text       = element_text(size = 15, face = "plain"),
    legend.title      = element_text(size = 16)
  )

# הצגה על המסך
OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot_HMA_transparent

# 5. שמירה לקובץ PNG עם רקע שקוף
ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot_HMA_transparent.png",
  plot   = OFR_vs_OsculumArea_plot_HMA_transparent,
  width  = 7,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "transparent"
)


```


```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}
## ==== A.oroides – ΔO2 vs ΣOsculum Area (plot for presentation) ==== 

# 1. טעינת נתוני A.oroides
Aoroides_df <- NW_Ind_summary %>%
  filter(Species == "A.oroides")

# 2. Theme שקוף + מסגרת שחורה
presentation_theme <- theme(
  panel.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),  
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),  
  panel.border      = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8),  # ← מסגרת!
  panel.grid        = element_blank(),
  axis.line         = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
  axis.title.x      = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.title.y      = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text.x       = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 12)
)

# 3. יצירת הגרף
DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot_transparent <-
  ggplot(Aoroides_df, aes(
    x = osculum_area_sum,
    y = Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean
  )) +
  geom_point(
    size = 4,
    color = "#FF7F00",
    shape = 17
  ) +
  scale_x_log10() +
  scale_y_log10() +
  labs(
    x = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
    y = expression(Delta*O[2]~"("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  presentation_theme

# 4. הצגה
DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot_transparent

# 5. שמירה עם רקע שקוף
ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Aoroides_DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_transparent.png",
  plot   = DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot_transparent,
  width  = 5,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "transparent"
)

```


```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}

## ==== A.oroides – ΔO₂ vs Volume (plot for presentation) ==== 

# 1. סינון נתונים ל-A.oroides בלבד
Aoroides_df <- NW_Ind_summary %>%
  filter(Species == "A.oroides")

# 2. Theme מוצגת עם רקע שקוף + מסגרת
presentation_theme <- theme(
  panel.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
  panel.border      = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
  panel.grid        = element_blank(),
  axis.line         = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.6),
  axis.title.x      = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.title.y      = element_text(size = 20),
  axis.text.x       = element_text(size = 12),
  axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 12)
)

# 3. יצירת הגרף דרך הפונקציה שלך + הוספת theme למצגת
DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot <-
  plot_powerlaw_single(
    df    = Aoroides_df,
    xvar  = "Volume_ml",
    yvar  = "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean",
    xlab  = expression("Volume (mL)"),
    ylab  = expression(Delta*O[2]~"("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")"),
    fname = NULL   # לא שומר כאן — נשמור ידנית עם רקע שקוף
  ) +
  presentation_theme

# 4. הצגת הגרף
DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot

# 5. שמירה עם רקע שקוף (PNG)
ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Aoroides_DeltaO2_vs_Volume_transparent.png",
  plot   = DeltaO2_vs_Volume_Aoroides_plot,
  width  = 5,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "transparent"
)



```



```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}

library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

fr_table <- tribble(
  ~group_volume, ~PR_L_hr, ~Rind_umol_hr, ~FR_L_umol, ~FR_L_mL,
  ~DeltaO2_umol_L, ~inv_Delta_L_umol, ~inv_Delta_L_mL,
  "<100",   6,  84, 0.071, 3.17, 16, 0.0625, 2.79,
  "100–200",14, 264,0.053, 2.37, 18, 0.0556, 2.48,
  "200–400",19, 336,0.057, 2.54, 15, 0.0667, 2.98,
  ">400",   23,366,0.063, 2.81, 16, 0.0625, 2.79
) %>%
  mutate(
    group_volume = factor(
      group_volume,
      levels = c("<100","100–200","200–400",">400")
    )
  )

bottle_green <- "#0F4C45"

presentation_theme <- theme(
  panel.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "black"),
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
  panel.grid        = element_blank(),
  axis.line         = element_line(colour = "black"),
  axis.title        = element_text(size = 18),
  axis.text         = element_text(size = 12),
  legend.position   = "none"
)

# === גרסה עם ציר Y מוגדל ===
FR_plot_scaled <- ggplot(fr_table,
    aes(x = group_volume, y = FR_L_umol, group = 1)) +
 # geom_line(colour = bottle_green, linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(colour = bottle_green, size = 5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.10)) +
  labs(
    x = "Volume group (mL)",
    y = expression(F/R~"(L"~mu*mol~O[2]^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  presentation_theme

FR_plot_scaled

ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/FR_ratio_scaled.png",
  FR_plot_scaled, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent"
)

# טבלה שכבר קיימת אצלך: fr_table

bottle_green <- "#0F4C45"

presentation_theme <- theme(
  panel.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "black"),
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
  panel.grid        = element_blank(),
  axis.line         = element_line(colour = "black"),
  axis.title        = element_text(size = 18),
  axis.text         = element_text(size = 12),
  legend.position   = "none"
)

FR_mL_plot <- ggplot(fr_table,
                  aes(x = group_volume, y = FR_L_mL, group = 1)) +
  #geom_line(colour = bottle_green, linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(colour = bottle_green, size = 5) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 4)) +
  labs(
    x = "Volume group (mL)",
    y = expression(F/R~"(L"~mL~O[2]^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  presentation_theme

FR_mL_plot

ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/FR_ratio_mL_by_volume.png",
  FR_mL_plot, width = 5, height = 4, dpi = 300, bg = "transparent"
)

```

```{r SizeClass_Figures_setup, include=FALSE}
# --- Panel - SizeClass_Ind_summary_table ---

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# 1. צבעים לכל מין
species_colors <-  c(
  "C.cyathophora"   = "#BAD6D3",
  "C.siphonella"    = "#939ECC",
  "D.erythraeanus"  = "#A65628",
  "N.rowi"          = "#377EB8",
  "S.clavatus"      = "#EEB422",
  "T.swinhoei"      = "#8B2323",
  "A.oroides"       = "#FF7F00",
  "C.reniformis"    = "#BD9D80",
  "D.avara"         = "#A680BD",
  "M.fistulifera"   = "#E41A1C"
)

# 2. צורות: HMA = עיגול ממולא, LMA = עיגול ריק
shape_values_HMA_LMA <- c(
  "HMA" = 19,  # עיגול מלא
  "LMA" = 1    # עיגול ריק
)

# 3. עמודות מחושבות מראש + fill_species
SizeClass_Ind_summary_table <- SizeClass_Ind_summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    fill_species = ifelse(
      HMA_LMA == "HMA",
      species_colors[Species],
      "white"
    ),
    PRV = avg_PR_L_hr / avg_Volume_ml,
    RV  = avg_Rind_umol_hr / avg_Volume_ml
  )

# 4. Theme אחיד עם רקע שקוף
my_plot_theme <- theme(
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
  axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
  axis.text  = element_text(size = 20),
  legend.text  = element_text(size = 13, face = "plain"),
  legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.key   = element_blank(),
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  legend.position   = "right",
  # רקע שקוף
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)
)

# 5. פונקציה ליצירת גרף log-log עם fill + קו מגמה
plot_power_law <- function(df, xvar, yvar, xlab, ylab) {

  data_valid <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data[[xvar]]),
      !is.na(.data[[yvar]]),
      .data[[xvar]] > 0,
      .data[[yvar]] > 0
    )

  formula_str <- paste0("log(", yvar, ") ~ log(", xvar, ")")
  model <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = data_valid)
  sm <- summary(model)

  a    <- exp(coef(model)[1])
  b    <- coef(model)[2]
  r2   <- sm$r.squared
  pval <- sm$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

  trend_line <- NULL
  eq_text    <- NULL

  if (pval < 0.05) {
    x_vals <- seq(min(data_valid[[xvar]]), max(data_valid[[xvar]]), length.out = 100)
    y_vals <- a * x_vals^b
    trend_line <- data.frame(x = x_vals, y = y_vals)

    eq_text <- paste0(
      "italic(y) == ", signif(a, 3), " * x^", signif(b, 3),
      "*','~~italic(R)^2 == ", signif(r2, 3)
    )
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(
    x     = xvar,
    y     = yvar,
    color = "Species",
    shape = "HMA_LMA",
    fill  = "fill_species"
  )) +
    geom_point(size = 5, stroke = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = species_colors) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shape_values_HMA_LMA) +
    scale_fill_identity() +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(
      x = xlab,
      y = ylab,
      color = "Species",
      shape = "Microbial type",
      fill  = "Type"
    ) +
    my_plot_theme +
    guides(
      # שמות המינים בנטוי
      color = guide_legend(
        title = "Species",
        label.theme = element_text(size = 13, face = "italic")
      ),
      # HMA / LMA לא נטוי
      shape = guide_legend(
        title = "Type",
        label.theme = element_text(size = 13, face = "plain")
      )
    )

  if (!is.null(trend_line)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_line(
        data = trend_line,
        aes(x = x, y = y),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        color = "black",
        linetype = "dashed",
        linewidth = 1
      ) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x     = min(data_valid[[xvar]]) * 1.4,
        y     = max(data_valid[[yvar]]) * 0.65,
        label = eq_text,
        parse = TRUE,
        hjust = 0,
        vjust = -0.7,
        size  = 5
      )
  }

  return(p)
}

# 6. יצירת האיורים למצגת

# PR מול נפח
PR_vs_Volume_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df   = SizeClass_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar = "avg_Volume_ml",
  yvar = "avg_PR_L_hr",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")")
)

# PRv (קצב שאיבה ספציפי) מול נפח
PRV_vs_Volume_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df   = SizeClass_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar = "avg_Volume_ml",
  yvar = "PRV",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression("PRv (L hr"^{-1}~mL^{-1}*")")
)

# נשימה מוחלטת מול נפח
Rind_vs_Volume_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df   = SizeClass_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar = "avg_Volume_ml",
  yvar = "avg_Rind_umol_hr",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression("Respiration (μmol O"[2]*" hr"^{-1}*")")
)

# נשימה ספציפית מול נפח
RV_vs_Volume_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df   = SizeClass_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar = "avg_Volume_ml",
  yvar = "RV",
  xlab = expression("Volume (mL)"),
  ylab = expression("Specific respiration (μmol O"[2]*" hr"^{-1}~mL^{-1}*")")
)

# אפשר להדפיס כדי לראות ברצף ב-Rmd:
PR_vs_Volume_plot
PRV_vs_Volume_plot
Rind_vs_Volume_plot
RV_vs_Volume_plot

# 7. שמירה לקבצים עם רקע שקוף
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Fig_PR_vs_Volume_presentation.png",   PR_vs_Volume_plot,
       width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Fig_PRV_vs_Volume_presentation.png",  PRV_vs_Volume_plot,
       width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Fig_Rind_vs_Volume_presentation.png", Rind_vs_Volume_plot,
       width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")
ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Fig_RV_vs_Volume_presentation.png",   RV_vs_Volume_plot,
       width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")

```


```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}
# --- Panel - Osculum_Ind_summary_table ---

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(cowplot)
library(patchwork)

# 1. הגדרת צבעים לכל מין
species_colors <-  c(
  "C.cyathophora"   = "#BAD6D3",
  "C.siphonella"    = "#939ECC",
  "D.erythraeanus"  = "#A65628",
  "N.rowi"          = "#377EB8",
  "S.clavatus"      = "#EEB422",
  "T.swinhoei"      = "#8B2323",
  "A.oroides"       = "#FF7F00",
  "C.reniformis"    = "#BD9D80",
  "D.avara"         = "#A680BD",
  "M.fistulifera"   = "#E41A1C"
)

# 2. צורות: HMA = עיגול ממולא, LMA = עיגול ריק
shape_values_HMA_LMA <- c(
  "HMA" = 19,  # עיגול מלא
  "LMA" = 1    # עיגול ריק
)

# 3. fill לפי HMA/LMA
Osculum_Ind_summary_table <- Osculum_Ind_summary_table %>%
  mutate(
    fill_species = ifelse(
      HMA_LMA == "HMA",
      species_colors[Species],
      "white"
    )
  )

# 4. Theme משותף עם רקע שקוף
my_plot_theme <- theme(
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  panel.grid       = element_blank(),
  panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  axis.line        = element_line(color = "black"),
  axis.title       = element_text(size = 25),
  axis.text        = element_text(size = 20),
  legend.text      = element_text(size = 13, face = "plain"),
  legend.title     = element_text(size = 14),
  legend.key       = element_blank(),
  legend.background = element_blank(),
  legend.position   = "right",
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA) # רקע שקוף
)

# 5. פונקציה ליצירת גרף log-log עם קו מגמה + fill species
plot_power_law <- function(df, xvar, yvar, xlab, ylab) {

  data_valid <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data[[xvar]]),
      !is.na(.data[[yvar]]),
      .data[[xvar]] > 0,
      .data[[yvar]] > 0
    )

  formula_str <- paste0("log(", yvar, ") ~ log(", xvar, ")")
  model <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = data_valid)
  sm    <- summary(model)

  a    <- exp(coef(model)[1])
  b    <- coef(model)[2]
  r2   <- sm$r.squared
  pval <- sm$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

  trend_line <- NULL
  eq_text    <- NULL

  if (pval < 0.05) {
    x_vals <- seq(min(data_valid[[xvar]]), max(data_valid[[xvar]]), length.out = 100)
    y_vals <- a * x_vals^b
    trend_line <- data.frame(x = x_vals, y = y_vals)

    eq_text <- paste0(
      "italic(y) == ", signif(a, 3), " * x^", signif(b, 3),
      "*','~~italic(R)^2 == ", signif(r2, 3)
    )
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(
    x     = xvar,
    y     = yvar,
    color = "Species",
    shape = "HMA_LMA",
    fill  = "fill_species"
  )) +
    geom_point(size = 5, stroke = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = species_colors) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = shape_values_HMA_LMA) +
    scale_fill_identity() +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(
      x = xlab,
      y = ylab,
      color = "Species",
      shape = "Microbial type",
      fill  = "Type"
    ) +
    my_plot_theme +
    guides(
      # שמות המינים בנטוי
      color = guide_legend(
        title = "Species",
        label.theme = element_text(size = 13, face = "italic")
      ),
      # HMA/LMA לא נטוי
      shape = guide_legend(
        title = "Type",
        label.theme = element_text(size = 13, face = "plain")
      )
    )

  if (!is.null(trend_line)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_line(
        data = trend_line,
        aes(x = x, y = y),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        color = "black",
        linetype = "dashed",
        linewidth = 1
      ) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x     = min(data_valid[[xvar]]) * 1.4,
        y     = max(data_valid[[yvar]]) * 0.65,
        label = eq_text,
        parse = TRUE,
        hjust = 0,
        vjust = -0.7,
        size  = 5
      )
  }

  return(p)
}

# --- 6 איורים בודדים ---

DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df    = Osculum_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar  = "avg_osculum_area_mm2_sum",
  yvar  = "avg_Delta_O2_umol_L",
  xlab  = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab  = expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")")
)

PR_vs_SumOSA_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df    = Osculum_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar  = "avg_osculum_area_mm2_sum",
  yvar  = "avg_PR_L_hr",
  xlab  = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab  = expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")")
)

Rind_vs_SumOSA_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df    = Osculum_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar  = "avg_osculum_area_mm2_sum",
  yvar  = "avg_Rind_umol_hr",
  xlab  = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab  = expression("R"["ind"]~ " ("*mu*"mol hr"^{-1}*")")
)

RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df    = Osculum_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar  = "avg_osculum_area_mm2_sum",
  yvar  = "RsumOSA",
  xlab  = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab  = expression(R[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2}*")")
)

PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_plot <- plot_power_law(
  df    = Osculum_Ind_summary_table,
  xvar  = "avg_osculum_area_mm2_sum",
  yvar  = "PRsumOSA",
  xlab  = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab  = expression(PR[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * "L hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2} * ")")
)


ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/PR_vs_SumOSA_plot.png",  PR_vs_SumOSA_plot,
       width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")


```


```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# --- Theme למצגת עם רקע שקוף ---
my_plot_theme <- theme(
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  panel.grid       = element_blank(),
  panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  axis.line        = element_line(color = "black"),
  axis.title       = element_text(size = 25),
  axis.text        = element_text(size = 20),
  legend.position  = "none",
  plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA)  # רקע שקוף
)

# --- פונקציה לציור איור log-log עם קו מגמה (למין אחד) ---
plot_powerlaw_single <- function(df, xvar, yvar, xlab, ylab,
                                 color = "#FF7F00", shape = 17,
                                 fname = NULL) {

  data_valid <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(
      !is.na(.data[[xvar]]),
      !is.na(.data[[yvar]]),
      .data[[xvar]] > 0,
      .data[[yvar]] > 0
    )

  formula_str <- paste0("log(", yvar, ") ~ log(", xvar, ")")
  model <- lm(as.formula(formula_str), data = data_valid)
  sm    <- summary(model)

  a    <- exp(coef(model)[1])
  b    <- coef(model)[2]
  r2   <- sm$r.squared
  pval <- sm$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]

  trend_line <- NULL
  eq_text    <- NULL

  if (!is.na(pval) && pval < 0.05) {
    x_vals <- seq(min(data_valid[[xvar]]), max(data_valid[[xvar]]), length.out = 100)
    y_vals <- a * x_vals^b
    trend_line <- data.frame(x = x_vals, y = y_vals)

    eq_text <- paste0(
      "italic(y) == ", signif(a, 3), " * x^", signif(b, 3),
      "*','~~italic(R)^2 == ", signif(r2, 3)
    )
  }

  p <- ggplot(df, aes_string(x = xvar, y = yvar)) +
    geom_point(size = 4, color = color, shape = shape) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    my_plot_theme

  if (!is.null(trend_line)) {
    p <- p +
      geom_line(
        data = trend_line,
        aes(x = x, y = y),
        inherit.aes = FALSE,
        color = "black",
        linetype = "dashed",
        linewidth = 1
      ) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x     = min(data_valid[[xvar]]) * 1.5,
        y     = max(data_valid[[yvar]]) * 0.75,
        label = eq_text,
        parse = TRUE,
        hjust = 0,
        vjust = -0.7,
        size  = 5
      )
  }

  # שמירה לקובץ (אם ביקשנו שם קובץ)
  if (!is.null(fname)) {
    ggsave(
      filename = fname,
      plot     = p,
      width    = 5,
      height   = 5,
      dpi      = 600,
      bg       = "transparent"   # רקע שקוף בקובץ
    )
  }

  return(p)
}

# --- 1. עמודות מחושבות ל-A. oroides ---
Aoroides_df <- Aoroides_df %>%
  mutate(
    RsumOSA  = Rind_umol_hr / osculum_area_sum,
    PRsumOSA = PR_L_hr      / osculum_area_sum
  )

# נתיב בסיס לתיקיית הכנס
base_dir <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/"

# --- 2. ציור ושמירה של האיורים ---

DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = file.path(base_dir, "DeltaO2_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png")
)

PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "PR_L_hr",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = file.path(base_dir, "PR_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png")
)

Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "Rind_umol_hr",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression("R"["ind"]~ "("*mu*"mol hr"^{-1}*")"),
  fname = file.path(base_dir, "Rind_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png")
)

RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "RsumOSA",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression(R[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2}*")"),
  fname = file.path(base_dir, "RsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png")
)

PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_panel <- plot_powerlaw_single(
  Aoroides_df,
  xvar = "osculum_area_sum",
  yvar = "PRsumOSA",
  xlab = expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")"),
  ylab = expression(PR[sum(OSA)] ~ "(" * "L hr"^{-1}~mm^{-2} * ")"),
  fname = file.path(base_dir, "PRsumOSA_vs_SumOSA_Aoroides_plot.png")
)



```


```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# --- Theme למצגת עם רקע שקוף ---
my_plot_theme <- theme(
  panel.background = element_blank(),
  plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
  panel.grid       = element_blank(),
  panel.border     = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "black"),
  axis.line        = element_line(color = "black"),
 axis.title       = element_text(size = 25),
  axis.text        = element_text(size = 20),
  legend.position  = "none"
)

# --- עמודות מחושבות ---
NW_Ind_summary <- NW_Ind_summary %>%
  mutate(
    RV_umol_hr_ml = Rind_umol_hr / Volume_ml,
    PRV_L_hr_ml   = PR_L_hr / Volume_ml
  )

# --- פונקציה פשוטה לגרף log-log עם קו מגמה רק אם מובהק ---
plot_power_law_simple <- function(df, xvar, yvar, xlab, ylab,
                                  point_color = "#FF7F00") {
  
  data_valid <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[xvar]]), !is.na(.data[[yvar]]),
           .data[[xvar]] > 0, .data[[yvar]] > 0)
  
  model <- lm(as.formula(paste0("log(", yvar, ") ~ log(", xvar, ")")),
              data = data_valid)
  sm <- summary(model)
  a    <- exp(coef(model)[1])
  b    <- coef(model)[2]
  r2   <- sm$r.squared
  pval <- sm$coefficients[2, "Pr(>|t|)"]
  
  p <- ggplot(data_valid, aes_string(x = xvar, y = yvar)) +
    geom_point(size = 5, color = point_color, shape = 17) +
    scale_x_log10() +
    scale_y_log10() +
    labs(x = xlab, y = ylab) +
    my_plot_theme
  
  if (pval < 0.05) {
    x_vals <- seq(min(data_valid[[xvar]]), 
                  max(data_valid[[xvar]]), 
                  length.out = 100)
    y_vals <- a * x_vals^b
    trend_line <- data.frame(x = x_vals, y = y_vals)
    
    eq_text <- paste0(
      "italic(y) == ", signif(a, 3), 
      " * x^", signif(b, 3),
      "*','~~italic(R)^2 == ", signif(r2, 3)
    )
    
    p <- p +
      geom_line(data = trend_line, aes(x = x, y = y),
                inherit.aes = FALSE,
                color = "black", linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 1) +
      annotate(
        "text",
        x     = min(data_valid[[xvar]]) * 1.3,
        y     = max(data_valid[[yvar]]) * 0.95,  # 👈 היה 0.7, עכשיו כמעט למעלה
        label = eq_text,
        parse = TRUE,
        hjust = 0,
        vjust = 1,
        size  = 5
      )
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# --- נתיב שמירה בסיסי ---
save_path <- "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/"

# --- יצירת כל האיורים ---
plots <- list(
  Delta_O2_Volume_ml_plot = plot_power_law_simple(
    NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean",
    expression("Volume (mL)"),
    expression(Delta*O[2]*" ("*mu*"mol L"^{-1}*")")
  ),
  
  PR_Volume_ml_plot = plot_power_law_simple(
    NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "PR_L_hr",
    expression("Volume (mL)"),
    expression("PR (L hr"^{-1}*")")
  ),
  
  Rind_Volume_ml_plot = plot_power_law_simple(
    NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "Rind_umol_hr",
    expression("Volume (mL)"),
    expression(R[ind]~ "(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1} * ")")
  ),
  
  RV_Volume_ml_plot = plot_power_law_simple(
    NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "RV_umol_hr_ml",
    expression("Volume (mL)"),
    expression(R[V]~"(" * mu * "mol hr"^{-1}~mL^{-1} * ")")
  ),
  
  PRV_Volume_ml_plot = plot_power_law_simple(
    NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "PRV_L_hr_ml",
    expression("Volume (mL)"),
    expression(PR[V]~"(" * "L hr"^{-1}~mL^{-1} * ")")
  ),
  
  osculum_area_sum_Volume_ml_plot = plot_power_law_simple(
    NW_Ind_summary, "Volume_ml", "osculum_area_sum",
    expression("Volume (mL)"),
    expression(Sigma~"Osculum area (mm"^2*")")
  )
)

# --- שמירה עם רקע שקוף ---
for (n in names(plots)) {
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(save_path, n, ".png"),
    plot     = plots[[n]],
    width    = 5, height = 5, dpi = 600,
    bg       = "transparent"
  )
}

```

```{r, fig.width=7,fig.height=5}


library(dplyr)

Ind_summary_Size_Class <- Ind_summary_df %>%
  # 1️⃣ סינון רק נתונים עם Size_Class
  filter(!is.na(Size_Class)) %>%

  # 2️⃣ לחשב F/R בשתי שיטות + 3️⃣ לחשב 1/ΔO₂
  mutate(
    FR_L_umol = PR_L_hr / Rind_umol_hr,
    FR_L_ml   = FR_L_umol * 44.64788732,
    Inv_Delta_O2 = 1 / Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean
  )



# קודם מנקים ומחשבים את שלושת הטורים החדשים
Ind_summary_clean <- Ind_summary_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(Size_Class)) %>%
  mutate(
    FR_L_umol = PR_L_hr / Rind_umol_hr,
    FR_L_ml   = FR_L_umol * 44.64788732,
    Inv_Delta_O2 = 1 / Delta_O2_umol_L_mean_mean
  )

# פונקציה קטנה לחישובי ממוצע + SE + CI
summary_stats <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  n  <- length(x)
  mean_x <- mean(x)
  sd_x   <- sd(x)
  se_x   <- sd_x / sqrt(n)
  ci95   <- 1.96 * se_x
  data.frame(
    mean = mean_x,
    n = n,
    sd = sd_x,
    se = se_x,
    ci95 = ci95
  )
}

# חישוב לכל אחד משלושת המשתנים לפי Size_Class
SizeClass_summary <- Ind_summary_clean %>%
  group_by(Size_Class) %>%
  summarise(
    FR_L_umol_summary = list(summary_stats(FR_L_umol)),
    FR_L_ml_summary   = list(summary_stats(FR_L_ml)),
    Inv_DeltaO2_summary = list(summary_stats(Inv_Delta_O2))
  ) %>%
  tidyr::unnest_wider(FR_L_umol_summary, names_sep = "_FRumol") %>%
  tidyr::unnest_wider(FR_L_ml_summary, names_sep = "_FRml") %>%
  tidyr::unnest_wider(Inv_DeltaO2_summary, names_sep = "_InvD")

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# אם Size_Class 1–4 תואם לקטגוריות הנפח:
volume_labels <- c("<100", "100–200", "200–400", ">400")

plot_df <- SizeClass_summary %>%
  mutate(
    group_volume = factor(Size_Class,
                          levels = 1:4,
                          labels = volume_labels)
  )


bottle_green <- "#0F4C45"

presentation_theme <- theme(
  panel.background  = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = "black"),
  plot.background   = element_rect(fill = NA, colour = NA),
  panel.grid        = element_blank(),
  axis.line         = element_line(colour = "black"),
  axis.title        = element_text(size = 18),
  axis.text         = element_text(size = 12),
  legend.position   = "none"
)



FR_plot_scaled <- ggplot(
  plot_df,
  aes(x = group_volume,
      y = FR_L_umol_summary_FRumolmean)
) +
  geom_point(colour = bottle_green, size = 5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = FR_L_umol_summary_FRumolmean - FR_L_umol_summary_FRumolci95,
      ymax = FR_L_umol_summary_FRumolmean + FR_L_umol_summary_FRumolci95
    ),
    width = 0.1,
    colour = bottle_green
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.10)) +
  labs(
    x = "Volume group (mL)",
    y = expression(F/R~"(L"~mu*mol~O[2]^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  presentation_theme

FR_plot_scaled


FR_mL_plot <- ggplot(
  plot_df,
  aes(x = group_volume,
      y = FR_L_ml_summary_FRmlmean)
) +
  geom_point(colour = bottle_green, size = 5) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(
      ymin = FR_L_ml_summary_FRmlmean - FR_L_ml_summary_FRmlci95,
      ymax = FR_L_ml_summary_FRmlmean + FR_L_ml_summary_FRmlci95
    ),
    width = 0.1,
    colour = bottle_green
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 10)) +
  labs(
    x = "Volume group (mL)",
    y = expression(F/R~"(L"~mL~O[2]^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  presentation_theme

FR_mL_plot



ggsave("C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/FR_mL_plot.png",  FR_mL_plot,width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "transparent")


```

```{r, fig.width=10,fig.height=7}

Volume_sponge_Data <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Volume_pumping_Weisz_Ludeman_Morganti.csv",
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)


library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)


Volume_sponge_Data <- Volume_sponge_Data %>%
  mutate(Region = case_when(
    Source == "Morganti"   ~ "Mediterranean Sea",
    Source == "Weisz"      ~ "Caribbean",
    Source == "This study" ~ "Red Sea",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  ))

Volume_sponge_Data <- Volume_sponge_Data %>%
  mutate(
    Region = factor(
      Region,
      levels = c("Mediterranean Sea", "Red Sea", "Caribbean")
    )
  )



bottle_green <- "#3E7F6B"
lma_beige    <- "#EFE8DA"

Volume_boxplot_by_sea<- ggplot(Volume_sponge_Data, aes(x = HMA_LMA, y = volume_mL , fill = HMA_LMA)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "black", linewidth = 0.7, outlier.shape = NA) +
 # stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 4, size = 3, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~Region, nrow = 1) +
  scale_y_log10(name = "Volume (mL)") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(HMA = bottle_green, LMA = lma_beige)) +
  labs(x = NULL,fill = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
   theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),

    panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1),

    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = "black", linewidth = 1),
    strip.text = element_text(color = "black", face = "bold"),

    axis.line = element_blank(),

    ## ✨ זה החלק החדש – legend שקוף ✨
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA)
  )
Volume_boxplot_by_sea


ggsave(
  "C:/Users/ASUS/Google Drive/PHD/Zoology Conference 2025/Volume_boxplot_by_sea.png",
  Volume_boxplot_by_sea,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "transparent"
)



n_by_region_HMA <- Volume_sponge_Data %>%
  group_by(Region, HMA_LMA) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

n_by_region_HMA


```
